summary: Removed #pragma clang loop unroll(disable) from all 9 Q4 kernels and removed 2 redundant bufferBarrier calls in attention projection encoding. Result: regression from 132.8 to 125.3 tok/s. The loop unrolling increased register pressure for the memory-bound Q4 kernels, reducing GPU occupancy. The barrier removal was too small to compensate. Original pragma was correct.

Interleaved Q4 weight reads across SIMD lanes for fully coalesced memory transactions. Changed all 9 Q4 kernels from strided access (lane l reads contiguous block at offset l*cols_per_lane, 32-byte inter-lane stride, 12.5% cache line utilization) to interleaved access (lane l reads word at w*32+lane, 4-byte inter-lane stride, 100% cache line utilization). Added per-word scale/bias accumulation since interleaved words span multiple groups.
